signals.headline: US Begins Blockade of Iranian Ports in Strait of Hormuz as Ceasefire Nears Expiration; Fresh Talks Eyed Before April 21
signals.raw:
US Begins Blockade of Iranian Ports in Strait of Hormuz as Ceasefire Nears Expiration; Fresh Talks Eyed Before April 21 Deadline | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

US President Trump ordered the military blockade today after weekend talks in Islamabad failed, aiming to pressure Iran amid a two-week ceasefire announced April 7 that expires early next week.[1][2] Reports confirm both sides are discussi
